name: show_booking_options
description: Open JourneyOS Booking and Checkout so the traveler can review flights, hotels, and payment details.

name: navigate
description: Navigate JourneyOS. Payload page: home, planner, checkout, live, expenses, or dna.

name: select_bundle
description: Select a booking bundle. Payload id: value, overall, or neighborhood.

name: confirm_booking
description: Open the admin payment step only after the user explicitly confirms the selected bundle.

name: collect_payment
description: Create the admin PayPal checkout only after the user explicitly asks to pay. The UI remains responsible for approval and capture.

name: search_live_sabre
description: After the traveler explicitly confirms an origin and destination airport code, search fresh Sabre CERT inventory. Payload: origin and destination, each a three-letter IATA code. Never guess a code from a city name; ask for confirmation first.

name: add_expense
description: Fill and add a shared expense. Payload: description, amount, paidBy, and optional participants. Ask for missing values before emitting.

name: add_traveler
description: Add a friend to the saved group. Payload: name and optional phone in E.164 format. First repeat the name and phone back and receive an explicit yes before emitting. This recalculates group totals and invalidates any previously searched Sabre inventory.

name: trip_brief_ready
description: Place a finalized spoken trip request into the JourneyOS editable trip brief. Payload field: conversation.

name: trip_plan_created
description: Notify the voice agent that JourneyOS structured and saved the trip brief.

name: journeyos_context
description: Supplies the current JourneyOS page, destination, dates, travelers, selected booking, and active itinerary day. Treat these facts as authoritative and do not restart planning.

name: replan_trip
description: Re-optimize the active itinerary day for a broad disruption. Payload type is tired, late, rain, closed, or flight-delay.

name: itinerary_command
description: Apply the traveler’s exact change to the currently selected itinerary day. Send the verbatim request in payload field query; the app resolves targets and supports complete, undo, start, skip, cancel, and delay.

name: show_day
description: Open a specific itinerary day. Payload field: day.
